name: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc.
description: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc. is a junior explorer and developer focused on the North Island Project, a large copper-gold porphyry system located near Port Hardy on northern Vancouver Island, British Columbia. The project covers over 34,000 hectares adjacent to the former BHP Island Copper Mine and hosts multiple discovered deposits. The company is advancing resource expansion and feasibility work on this district-scale asset.
